name: Docker Container Hardening Pattern
applicability: Read-only filesystem, CAP_DROP ALL, non-root user (uid 998), health checks, minimal alpine runtime. Best Docker hardening in the T29 corpus. Directly applicable to any containerized deployment.
home_connection: JASON-OS Docker/deployment research, SoNash Firebase deployment

name: Session Pool with Per-Endpoint Rate Limiting
applicability: Multiple sessions rotate on rate limits. Per-session, per-endpoint tracking with preemptive backoff. Pattern for managing rate-limited external APIs.
home_connection: SoNash 429 handling (CLAUDE.md Security Rule #3), external API management

name: Parser Versioning via Experimental Module
applicability: New API parsers developed in parallel without breaking existing code. Isolates impact of upstream API changes. Pattern for evolving external dependencies.
home_connection: Architecture reference for handling breaking upstream changes

name: Binary+Compression Cache (flatty+snappy)
applicability: Binary serialization + compression for Redis cache. More efficient than JSON. Nim-specific but principle universal.

name: Karax Virtual DOM (compile-time HTML)
applicability: React-like virtual DOM in Nim with compile-time HTML generation. Interesting but Nim-specific and not portable.

name: README Wiki References
applicability: Links to GitHub Wiki for deployment guides. Content not in repo.
